content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5 in a wallpaper app with no home-automation UI or metadata mention (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt); this may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple restricts HomeKit to apps that provide genuine home-automation functionality, and instantiating HMHomeManager can prompt a home-data permission dialog users won't understand in a wallpaper app. The code shows only a wallpaper category list, and the description mentions nothing home-related. Remove the HomeKit import and HMHomeManager instance, or add and document a real home-automation feature before submission.
